assistants.name: AI Product Manager
assistants.description: PM Skills-native product decision workbench that turns messy context into reviewable, defensible, executable Decision Packets.

description_i18n.en-US: PM Skills-native product decision workbench that turns messy context into reviewable, defensible, executable Decision Packets.
description_i18n.zh-CN: PM Skills-native 产品决策工作台：基于 phuryn/pm-skills，把混乱上下文变成可审查、可辩护、可执行的 Decision Packet。

prompts: I have messy ideas and feedback. Use PM frameworks to form a Decision Brief and judge whether to build, why, and how to validate next.
Review this PRD or product plan as a launch-ready PM reviewer. Find evidence gaps, scope risks, metric issues, and acceptance gaps.
Should we build this feature? Break it into key assumptions, risk ranking, and a minimum experiment plan instead of a feature list.
Turn this direction into an executable Decision Packet with trade-offs, non-goals, acceptance or validation, and an HTML review view when useful.

en-US: I have messy ideas and feedback. Use PM frameworks to form a Decision Brief and judge whether to build, why, and how to validate next.
Review this PRD or product plan as a launch-ready PM reviewer. Find evidence gaps, scope risks, metric issues, and acceptance gaps.
Should we build this feature? Break it into key assumptions, risk ranking, and a minimum experiment plan instead of a feature list.
Turn this direction into an executable Decision Packet with trade-offs, non-goals, acceptance or validation, and an HTML review view when useful.
zh-CN: 我有一堆混乱想法/反馈，帮我用 PM framework 形成一个 Decision Brief，判断要不要做、为什么、下一步怎么验证
这是我的 PRD/方案，别润色，按专业 PM 视角做 launch-ready review：找证据缺口、scope 风险、指标问题和验收缺口
这个功能想法该不该做？请拆成关键假设、风险排序和最小实验计划，不要直接写功能清单
把这个方向推进成可执行 Decision Packet：包含 trade-off、non-goals、验收/验证方式，并在需要时生成 HTML 审查视图

assistants.name: Code Test Case Agent
assistants.description: Generate directory-style functional test-cases from an existing project, with optional functional-test JSON as scenario input. Focused on engineering tests only.

description_i18n.en-US: Generate directory-style functional test-cases from an existing project, with optional functional-test JSON as scenario input. Focused on engineering tests only.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 基于现有代码项目生成目录式功能测试用例；功能测试 JSON 可选，仅作为场景输入。只面向工程测试。

prompts: Analyze this codebase and generate missing test-cases for the selected feature, then run the smallest relevant case verification command.
Use the attached functional test JSON to generate directory-style project test-cases and verify them.
Find a high-value untested path in this module, write case[version].caseName.json files in the existing test-cases style, and verify them.

en-US: Analyze this codebase and generate missing test-cases for the selected feature, then run the smallest relevant case verification command.
Use the attached functional test JSON to generate directory-style project test-cases and verify them.
Find a high-value untested path in this module, write case[version].caseName.json files in the existing test-cases style, and verify them.
zh-CN: 分析这个代码目录，为选中的功能补充 test-cases 目录式功能测试用例，并运行最小相关验证命令。
使用附加的功能测试 JSON 生成项目内目录式 case JSON，并完成验证。
在这个模块里找一个高价值未覆盖路径，按现有 test-cases 风格写 case[version].caseName.json 并验证。
